lemon_market_new_listings.description: Good condition.
The car is in poor condition. Both the exterior and interior show significant damage and heavy wear. The mechanical components require major repairs to be operational.

This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor surface scratches but is free of major dents or rust. The interior is well-kept with minimal wear on the upholstery. The mechanical systems are reliable and have been maintained according to schedule.

This vehicle is in good condition, having been well-cared for and consistently maintained. The exterior presents well with a glossy finish, though you may find a few minor stone chips and light surface scratches consistent with careful use. Inside, the interior is clean and smoke-free, with all power features, air conditioning, and the infotainment system functioning as intended. Mechanically, the car is dependable; the engine runs smoothly, the brakes are responsive, and the tires have plenty of tread remaining. This is a reliable choice for someone looking for a quality vehicle that is ready for the road without needing immediate repairs.

Ready for a rewarding project? This vehicle is the perfect canvas for a restoration enthusiast! While it currently requires significant mechanical work and cosmetic repairs to be road-ready, it offers a fantastic entry point for someone who loves to get their hands dirty and bring a car back to life.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently maintained to ensure reliable performance. The engine runs smoothly, and the transmission shifts as expected. While the exterior and interior show some minor signs of normal wear, such as light surface scratches and slight upholstery aging, the car remains aesthetically pleasing and structurally sound. It’s a dependable choice for anyone looking for a well-cared-for vehicle that is ready for the road.

Presented here is a superlative example of automotive excellence, maintained to an exacting standard that mirrors its original showroom delivery. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior cabin preserved in pristine, untouched condition. Mechanically, it operates with the precision and silence of a new machine, offering a peerless driving experience for the discerning collector or enthusiast. We invite the most rigorous inspections to confirm its unrivaled state of preservation.

Hey there! You have to see this absolute beauty! It’s in pristine condition and honestly looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve taken incredible care of it, so it's spotless inside and out and drives like a dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new and ready for its next adventure, this is definitely the one for you! Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love it!

Collector-grade E46 M3 featuring the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual. This example has undergone extensive preventative maintenance, including rod bearing replacement and rear subframe reinforcement. The M-variable limited-slip differential provides optimal torque distribution, while the factory-spec suspension maintains precise turn-in response. The exterior maintains a showroom-quality finish with zero clear coat failure, and the interior Nappa leather shows no bolster wear. Mechanically flawless with documented compression results and a clean Blackstone oil report, this is a turn-key enthusiast piece.
Mint condition. Single owner. Full service history. Garage kept. No accidents. Inspection ready.

This vehicle is a true showroom-quality specimen, meticulously maintained and kept in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior finish is flawless, with a deep, mirror-like luster and absolutely no imperfections, scratches, or stone chips to be found. Inside, the cabin retains that 'new car' aroma; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of wear, creasing, or fading, and every electronic component—from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced navigation interface—functions with factory precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach. It comes with a complete, documented service history performed exclusively by certified technicians at scheduled intervals. The engine runs whisper-quiet, and the transmission shifts with seamless fluid motion. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that looks, feels, and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line. The sale includes all original manuals, two sets of keys, and a pristine vehicle history report for your total peace of mind.

Presenting a superlative specimen of automotive engineering, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom-ready condition, exhibiting flawless aesthetic and mechanical integrity. A rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a turn-key investment that exemplifies peak preservation.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, this vehicle is offered in pristine, showroom-grade condition. Meticulously maintained and displaying no discernible wear, it features an unblemished exterior paired with an interior of impeccable integrity. This is a definitive acquisition for the connoisseur who mandates uncompromising quality and mechanical perfection.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, it’s a total dream. This car has been babied since day one—it’s in such incredible shape you’d think it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been kept tucked away in a garage, meticulously cared for, and still has that fresh feel. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new and ready for its next adventure, you’ve definitely found it. Come see it for yourself, I promise you're going to love it!
This E46 M3 is a museum-grade example featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering peak power through six individual
Mint condition. Single owner. Zero accidents. Garage kept. Service records available. Inspection welcome.

This vehicle is a true collector's dream, preserved in showroom condition since the day it rolled off the lot. The exterior boasts a flawless, deep-gloss finish with no chips, swirls, or imperfections, further protected by a premium ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in an absolute pristine state; the high-grade leather upholstery shows zero wear, and the original protective films are still present on several interior trim pieces. Mechanically, the car is indistinguishable from new, featuring a comprehensive service history documented exclusively through the original dealership with all maintenance performed ahead of schedule. Always garage-kept under a breathable cover in a climate-controlled environment and never driven in inclement weather. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that looks, feels, and drives exactly as it did on the showroom floor.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting an impeccable exterior finish and a pristine interior that reflects meticulous stewardship. Mechanically flawless and aesthetically superior, it offers a driving experience indistinguishable from its original delivery state. We invite the discerning enthusiast to acquire this benchmark of craftsmanship, maintained to the highest standards of excellence.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of unparalleled distinction. This specimen exhibits an uncompromising level of preservation, reflecting a standard of care synonymous with a showroom-floor acquisition. Every facet, from the flawless exterior finish to the meticulously maintained interior appointments, attests to its exemplary provenance. For the discerning enthusiast who demands absolute perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to secure a benchmark-quality automobile.

Hey there! You've gotta see this beauty – it’s honestly in such incredible shape, you’d think it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've absolutely babied this car since day one, keeping it tucked away in the garage and making sure it stays spotless inside and out. It drives like a dream and looks even better in person. I'm sad to see it go, but I know it’s going to make its next owner very happy. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

One owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Original paint. Interior flawless. Complete maintenance records included.

This vehicle is a pristine example of automotive excellence, preserved in showroom condition. The exterior boasts a flawless, deep-gloss finish without a single swirl mark or stone chip, while the interior remains untouched, retaining its original factory scent and supple leather texture. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, having been meticulously maintained with a full service history and strictly stored in a climate-controlled garage. Every button, switch, and feature operates with the precision of a new car. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a truly immaculate machine that drives as perfectly as it looks.

Hey there! I'm parting with my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, she’s a total dream. This car is in such incredible shape—it looks and drives just like it did the day I brought it home! I’ve been super careful with maintenance and it’s been kept tucked away in the garage, so it’s still looking absolutely pristine. If you're looking for that 'fresh off the lot' feel without the brand-new price tag, you’ve gotta come see this one. It’s ready for a new home, and I know you’re going to love it as much as I have!

This E46 M3 is a superlative example of the high-revving S54 platform. It features a factory-spec subframe and a meticulously maintained double-VANOS system, ensuring optimal cam phasing across the entire powerband. The 3.2L inline-six breathes through individual throttle bodies, delivering a razor-sharp throttle response and a linear torque curve. Power is transmitted through a crisp six-speed manual gearbox to a variable M-differential lock. The chassis remains taut with original bushings and a flawless suspension
Used car. Mint condition. Original paint. No accidents. Clean title. Garage kept. Fully serviced.
